title: Armor X
description: This mod add new armor and item.
body:
##                                         Main
This mod adds additional armor as well as items.

Namely: Slimes, amethyst, planks and oak logs, copper and leth, barrier and obsidian, emerald and glass, as well as diamond, emerald and nezerite blocks of objects and armor.

Item crafting is about the same as in vanilla minecraft, but I'll note those that don't match vanilla:

![barier](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49b4e237db45169bed8dd2a93968050cfc8e1b3a.png); !

![bedrock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75d9db30742742dd9c53087d8104d19552da3ab1.png); !

![craft-custom-netherblock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/243e6b7c16763c813c627800c179466a03dcedf5.png)

(craft netherblock armor and items).

And also the barrier armor has its own effects, which will be shown below:

![buffs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/315977e1e7128e09e0f3ce52215f764368b09d3a.png)

## What can this mod be useful for:

Firstly, this mod gives variety to the gameplay of the game, gives new goals for crafting any thing.

Secondly, the mod can be good for adding mods to the assembly to complicate the game in which there are no items as such.
